title: Simple talismans
description: Datapack that add simple talismans to minecraft
body:
# Simple Talismans
**Simple talismans** is a datapack created for fun.
It adds total of 10 talismans in to the game which are crafted differently!
Every recipe can be seen in the image gallery!
# Talisman Functions
## Health Boost:
- Main Item: Totem of undying
- Function: Gives more hearts to the player while held
- Hands: Both
- Max Level: 4
## Speed:
- Main Item: Prismarine Shard
- Function: Makes the player faster while held
- Hands: Both
- Max Level: 3
## Saturation:
- Main Item: Bowl
- Function: Gives the player Saturation while held
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 3
## Luck:
- Main Item: Oak Sappling
- Function: Gives the player luck status effect while held
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 3
## Posion:
- Main Item: Spider Eye
- Function: Gives nearby entites poison while held (Player does not get poisend, Better the level, larger the range is)
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 3
## Jump Boost:
- Main Item: Rabbit's foot
- Function: While held, player gets the status effect Jump Boost
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 3
## Night Vision:
- Main Item: Golden Carrot
- Function: Gives the player night vision while held
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 1
## Slow Falling:
- Main Item: Feather
- Function: Gives the player slow falling while held when 3 blocks above an air block
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 1
## Fire Resistance:
- Main Item: Magma Cream
- Function: Gives the player fire resistance status effect while held
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 1
## Water Breathing:
- Main Item: Prismarine Crystal/s
- Function: Gives the player water breathing status effect while held
- Hands: Offhand
- Max Level: 1

# Copyright
This datapack is free to be used by anyone under one condition, and that is to credit the original
owner/creator
